# mediaPause()

**Instance Method**

Tells you to pause playback of your media content.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func mediaPause()
```

## Discussion

Don’t call this method yourself. If you implement the [doc://com.apple.User-Notifications-UI/documentation/UserNotificationsUI/UNNotificationContentExtension/mediaPlayPauseButtonFrame] property in your view controller, the system calls this method when the user wants to stop playback of your media. Use your implementation of this method to pause playback at the current location.

## Supporting Media Playback

- **mediaPlayPauseButtonType**: The type of media button type to display.
- **UNNotificationContentExtensionMediaPlayPauseButtonType**: Constants indicating the type of media button to display.
- **mediaPlayPauseButtonFrame**: The frame rectangle to use for displaying a media playback button.
- **mediaPlayPauseButtonTintColor**: The tint color for the media playback button.
- **mediaPlay()**: Tells you to begin playback of your media content.
